title: tsuga chinensis var. tchekiangensis
intro: Tsuga chinensis var. tchekiangensis, also known as Chinese hemlock or Tchekiangensis fir, is a plant species in the cypress family, Pinaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, Tchekiangensis fir is often used in decoctions, infusions, and poultices, and is also made into a resin or oil for topical application.
